name: ATP Indoor Pickleball Facility
description: ATP Indoor Pickleball Facility is a place to play pickleball in Kenova, WV. There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Ceredo Senior Wellness Center
description: Ceredo Senior Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Huntington, WV. There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Ritter Park
description: Ritter Park is a place to play pickleball in Huntington, WV. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
